Usage: klist [[-c] [-f] [-e] [-a [-n]]] [-k [-t] [-K]] [name]

	-f 	 shows credentials flags
	-e 	 shows the encryption type
	-a 	 shows addresses
	  -n 	   do not reverse-resolve addresses
   options for keytabs:
	-t 	 show
